# Mixed Runtime Examples

## Python Alias

```python3
assert 2 + 2 == 4
```

## JavaScript Alias

```node
if (2 + 2 !== 4) throw new Error("math changed");
```

## TypeScript Alias

```ts
const count: number = 4;
if (count !== 4) throw new Error("unexpected count");
```

## Bash Alias

```sh
test "docs" = "docs"
```

## Unsupported

```ruby
raise "not part of v1"
```
